name: Outline / ghost (invert on hover)
structure: transparent + border, hover fills with brand color
visual: Transparent with a 1px accent/neutral border; inverts to a filled accent on hover. Same radius lane as the primary.
placement: The hero's SECOND CTA (secondary to the solid primary), and inside cards/pricing where a softer action is needed.
states: Hover fills with brand colour, label flips to contrast; focus ring.
animation: Hover: ~200ms background-fill sweep + label colour flip to contrast; focus ring fades in.
realWorld: Magic Heidi: outlined 'Watch Demo →' beside solid primary
Karbon: outlined 'Take a Tour' beside 'Book a Demo'

designLanguage.editorial: Hairline border → navy fill, mono label.
designLanguage.warm: Sharp ink border → fill on paper.
